rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Order revised as follows: states as of 10/31/10, the estate held $414,157.58 in cash and $60,783.44 in non-cash assets, as the Summary of Account figures were not correct; Order for Discharge and Exoneration of Bond struck from the caption as the order allows a petition for discharge and exoneration but is not an order for discharge and exoneration.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE SAMUEL J. CONTI REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer To The City And County Of S.F. Petition To Recover Trust Property Or, Alternatively, Impose Constructive Trust.
rulings.Rulings: Demurrer off calendar - Amended Petition to Recover Trust Property, etc. filed February 10, 2011. Hearing on March 2, 2011 is continued to March 30, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. for hearing on the Amended Petition. City and County of San Francisco to serve notice of the Amended Petition to all parties, including Robert Elliott, attorney for Respondent and Trustee Randall G. Dick, no later than February 28, 2011.
